# Btech Consulting

> Paris-based IT audit, strategic consulting, and IT offshoring firm serving European and international clients.

Btech Consulting helps organisations strengthen IT governance, secure their infrastructure, modernise their systems, and scale delivery capacity through managed offshoring.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Btech Consulting's IT audit, consulting, and offshoring expertise.
- [About](/about): Company story, mission, values, and team credentials.
- [Services](/services): IT audit, governance, cybersecurity, digital transformation, ERP advisory, DORA, M&A IT due diligence, and managed offshoring.
- [Blog](/blog): Expert articles on IT audit, cybersecurity, transformation, and offshoring.
- [Contact](/contact): Paris office address, phone, email, and inquiry form.
